decisions.briefing: Markets are broadly positive with NASDAQ up 1.6% and S&P 500 up 0.8% — a clear risk-on session led by tech and growth names. Despite favorable conditions, available cash sits at just $269.62 (below the $500 threshold for new positions), so no new buys are opened today. All six current holdings remain within their stop-loss and profit-target bands, and AAOI continues to show strong momentum at score 90 — the full portfolio is held as-is.

market_education.summary_en: Today's session was decidedly risk-on, with the NASDAQ surging 1.6% versus a more modest 0.8% gain in the S&P 500 — a spread that signals investors were actively rotating into high-growth technology and semiconductor names. This kind of outperformance by the NASDAQ typically reflects positive sentiment around AI infrastructure spending, cooling trade tensions, or stable rate expectations from the Federal Reserve. When growth stocks lead the broader market by this margin, it usually indicates rising risk appetite and growing conviction that forward earnings can justify stretched valuations.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場明顯呈現風險偏好格局，那斯達克指數大漲1.6%，遠優於標普500指數的0.8%漲幅，顯示資金積極湧入高成長科技及半導體類股。這種那斯達克大幅跑贏大市的走勢，通常反映投資者對人工智慧基建投資、貿易摩擦緩解或聯儲局利率政策趨於穩定抱持正面預期。當成長股以如此大的差距領跑大盤，往往意味著市場風險偏好回升，投資者對企業未來盈利前景的信心顯著增強。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-on' day means investors feel confident and are willing to buy higher-risk, higher-reward assets — especially tech stocks, growth names, and speculative plays. You can identify it when the NASDAQ significantly outperforms the S&P 500, as happened today (+1.6% vs +0.8%). The opposite state, 'risk-off,' occurs when fear rises and investors flee to safer assets like bonds, gold, and defensive dividend stocks.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）是指投資者信心充足，願意買入科技股、成長股等較高風險資產的市場狀態。今日那斯達克大幅跑贏標普500（+1.6% 對比 +0.8%），正是風險偏好升溫的典型訊號。相反地，「風險規避」（Risk-Off）則發生在市場恐慌升溫時，資金會轉向債券、黃金及防禦性高息股等避險資產。
